Art Insight

Curatorial texts, critical essays, artist research, and extended exhibition content from Caelis Galeria.

Art Fair

West Bund Art & Design Fair Shanghai 2024

Caelis Galería participated in the West Bund Art & Design Fair Shanghai 2024 at booth 137, presenting contemporary surrealist and pop art works by nine Spanish artists.

By Caelis Galería · November 7, 2024 · 4 min read

Art Fair

Caelis Galería at JINGART 2024

Caelis Galería returned to JINGART Beijing 2024 at SKP-S, presenting works by August Vilella, Juan Miguel Palacios, Javi Caboné, Jaime Sangro, Arol, Cesc Abad, and Debbie Reda.

By Caelis Galería · May 23, 2024 · 5 min read

Event

Sniqus 'Forever Friends' at Sabadell Contemporary Art Museum

Caelis Galería, in collaboration with the Catalonia Foundation, opened 'SNIQUS – Forever Friends' at the Sabadell Contemporary Art Museum in Spain, a nostalgic journey through the artist's childhood.

By Caelis Galería · May 18, 2024 · 4 min read

Event

Adam Handler 'Always Near You... Always'

Artelli, Artoneers, and Caelis Galería presented 'Always Near You, Always,' a groundbreaking solo exhibition by New York-born artist Adam Handler in Macau, featuring over fifty new paintings.

By Caelis Galería · March 8, 2024 · 8 min read

Art Fair

West Bund Art & Design Shanghai 2023

Caelis Galería participated in the 10th West Bund Art & Design Fair at booth B126, presenting works by Adam Handler, Arol, August Vilella, Debbie Reda, Jacob Vilató, Jaime Sancorlo, Juan Miguel Palacios, Vuitbits, and Xavi Carbonell.

By Caelis Galería · November 9, 2023 · 4 min read

Art Fair

T-ART CON 2023 Shanghai

Caelis Galería exhibited at T&ARTCON Shanghai 2023 at booth B23, presenting surrealist and pop artworks by Adam Handler, Arol, Debbie Reda, Fanny Brodar, Jaime Sancorlo, and Sniqus.

By Caelis Galería · October 12, 2023 · 3 min read

Event

The Fifth Grand Canal Cultural & Tourism Expo

Caelis Galería participated in the Fifth Grand Canal Cultural and Tourism Expo in Suzhou, presenting 22 works by influential Spanish artists at the Spanish Pavilion.

By Caelis Galería · September 21, 2023 · 6 min read

Event

'La Melodia Romántica' Spanish Young Artists Exhibition in Suzhou

Hong Art Museum and Caelis Galería jointly presented 'La Melodia Romántica - Spanish Young Artists Joint Exhibition' in Suzhou, celebrating the 50th anniversary of China-Spain diplomatic relations.

By Caelis Galería · September 20, 2023 · 7 min read

Event

August Vilella 'Unveiling the Eye' at Casa Milà

August Vilella's solo exhibition 'Unveiling the Eye' opened at La Pedrera - Casa Milà in Barcelona, showcasing the diverse subconscious universe revealed in his artworks.

By Caelis Galería · September 1, 2023 · 5 min read

Art Fair

Caelis Galería at JINGART 2023 Beijing

Caelis Galería made its JINGART debut in June 2023 at the Beijing Exhibition Center, joining 54 galleries from 11 countries in a vibrant celebration of contemporary art.

By Caelis Galería · June 1, 2023 · 5 min read

Art Fair

August Vilella at TEFAF New York 2023

Caelis Galería's represented artist August Vilella exhibited his latest artwork 'The Poet Girl' at TEFAF New York 2023 in collaboration with Galeria Mayoral (Booth 309).

By Caelis Galería · May 11, 2023 · 5 min read

Art Fair

August Vilella at Art Basel Hong Kong 2023

Caelis Galería's represented artist August Vilella exhibited 'You are my universe' at Art Basel Hong Kong 2023 in collaboration with Galeria Mayoral (Booth 3E04), receiving warm welcome from international collectors.

By Caelis Galería · March 21, 2023 · 4 min read
